sglang.title: [Minor] Fix logging typo
sglang.author: amosyou
sglang.bodyExcerpt: minor typo in logging the MLA optimization setting.

vllm.title: [Core][Frontend] Add Support for Inference Time mm_processor_kwargs
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #8742
This PR adds support for allowing mm_processor_kwargs provided at inference time. This is a follow-up to the PR which added support for them at initialization time: #8657; with this, we can pass a mm_processor_kwargs dict at inference time, whose keys take precendence over the init time mm

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add Early Validation For Chat Template / Tool Call Parser
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds some validation for quick checks that can be done prior to loading the model when starting the server. Currently, we do validate, but not until after the model is loaded, which can take a little while
FIX #7780
Examples:

Chat template

python -m vllm.entrypoints.openai.api_server \

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Add examples folder into Docker image so that we can leverage the templates*.jinja when serving models
vllm.author: panpan0000
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #NA (link existing issues this PR will resolve)
For lots of open source models, we will have to do as below
docker run 
    vllm/vllm-openai:latest \
    --model xxxx
    --chat-template template-xxx.jinja

since there already some template in examples folders , we can put them into the docker i

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix OpenAI API server startup with --disable-frontend-multiprocessing
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#8491 this causes the http server to always error out when --disable-frontend-multiprocessing is enabled (for example when using embedding models):
ERROR:    [Errno 98] error while attempting to bind on address ('0.0.0.0', 8000): address already in use

By passing the socket fd to uvicorn, we solve

vllm.title: mypy: check additional directories
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR turns on checking with mypy for additional parts of the vllm source
tree. It also refactors how mypy is run to keep the checking consistent between
the local dev workflow (format.sh) and the mypy github workflow for CI.
This PR is the low hanging fruit to check additional places that do not

vllm.title: Add `lm-eval` directly to requirements-test.txt
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We were installing lm-eval without a fixed version, inline during CI tests, so this PR tries to move it to the global test deps and lock onto lm-eval==0.4.4.

vllm.title: support bitsandbytes quantization with more models
vllm.author: chenqianfzh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR made bitsandbytes quantization available with more models.
The model verified in my tests are:

Falcon

tiiuae/falcon-7B, quantized in flight with TP = 1 (TP =2 is not supported as the head size is 71, which is indivisible by 2)
prequant 4bit, alokabhishek/falcon-7b-instruct-bnb-4bit


opt

vllm.title: [Misc] Improve validation errors around best_of and n
vllm.author: tjohnson31415
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In the OpenAI server, vLLM supports both the best_of and n sampling parameters. The internal validation of incoming greedy requests currently only checks the value of best_of to see if it is not greater than 1. best_of must be greater than or equal to n, so this effectively validates n as well; howe
